sections.draft_text: The pricing schedule is completed in accordance with the tender requirements. Pricing is provided on a Fixed Price basis, with options for Outcome Based T&M and Time and Materials, capped at a Not-To-Exceed (NTE) Price. Detailed pricing information is included in 'Quotation Attachment A – Work Order Price & Payment Arrangements'.

We confirm acceptance of the draft contract terms, ensuring compliance with all legal requirements, including the management of Intellectual Property as per the Work Order. We affirm that there are no judicial decisions against us relating to unpaid employee entitlements, and we are compliant with the Workplace Gender Equality Act 2012 (Cth).

Our project management approach is structured around a robust governance framework, ensuring clear reporting and accountability. Performance will be reviewed regularly, with the Commonwealth informed of Achieved Performance for each KPI and any required actions.

We provide two case studies demonstrating our capability to deliver similar services. These case studies highlight our methodology, past performance, and technical merit, aligning with the evaluation criteria of the tender.

Our transition approach ensures a seamless transition-in, with a structured plan for transition-out if required. We will complete and submit the AIC Schedule or Plan as specified, ensuring compliance with all AIC obligations.

Our technical approach is designed to meet all stated requirements, with detailed plans provided in accordance with the COD and Work Order. This ensures alignment with the tender's technical and planning expectations.

Quotations will be lodged electronically via AusTender, ensuring compliance with the specified procedures and deadlines. This process guarantees timely and secure submission of all required documents.
